artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a massive rusted cylindrical treatment tank, its valves seized and seams weeping bioluminescent green sludge, choked in mutant vines and dripping ooze, a sickly glow leaking from a cracked porthole as if something inside still breathes. Bruised stormy sky behind the crumbling plant. The looming tank fills the wide landscape frame, overgrowth climbing its sides. Wide 4:3 landscape, Gruul murky green and rust red, toxic menace, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Overgrown Treatment Tank
text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, put a sludge counter on target creature you control.
{3}, {T}, Remove four sludge counters from among creatures you control: Create a 4/4 green Sludge Ooze creature token with trample.
flavorText: The valves rusted shut decades ago. Something inside kept the lights on anyway.
